title: How OBD2 Works
tagline: Reading the car's own diagnostic language
description: An overview of the OBD2 standard: how the ECU reports faults, what trouble codes mean, and how scan tools talk to your car.

title: How ECUs Work
tagline: The brain behind every modern engine
description: What an engine control unit actually does, the sensors it listens to, and how it decides on fuel, timing, and boost in real time.

title: How Induction Works
tagline: From air filter to combustion chamber
description: Follow the path air takes into an engine and how the induction system shapes power, efficiency, and throttle response.

title: How Turbo Chargers Work
description: How a turbocharger spins up, builds boost, and why intercoolers, wastegates, and turbo lag all matter.
